scripts.db:migrate:remote:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply nihongo-mn-db --remote --env production
scripts.db:verify:n5:local: pnpm exec wrangler d1 execute nihongo-mn-db --local --command "SELECT (SELECT title_mn FROM chapters WHERE id=1) AS chapter, COUNT(*) AS lessons FROM lessons WHERE chapter_id=1"
scripts.db:count:local: wrangler d1 execute nihongo-mn-db --local --command "SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM words) AS word_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chapters) AS chapter_count"
